description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Large Crowds at Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 羅湖及落馬洲過關人數眾多

2024-03-29T12:03:00.CONTENT_EN: As it is travel peak period, there are currently large crowds crossing the boundary at Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau. Additional staff have been deployed to East Rail Line stations to assist passengers. Passengers are advised to reserve ample time for their travels and consider using other control points for boundary crossing.
2024-03-29T12:03:00.CONTENT_CN: 因應假日出行高峰，目前使用羅湖及落馬洲口岸的人數眾多，東鐵綫車站已加派人手協助乘客。請乘客為行程預留時間，並考慮使用其他口岸過關。

2024-03-29T13:55:00.CONTENT_EN:
As it is travel peak period, there are currently large crowds crossing the boundary at the Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau Spur Line control points. Additional staff have been deployed to East Rail Line stations to assist passengers. Passengers are advised to reserve ample time for their travels and consider using other control points for boundary crossing. 
In response to the crowds at the boundary crossings, train service frequency between Admiralty and Lo Wu/ Lok Ma Chau has been adjusted. Please pay attention to the destinations of the train trips.
2024-03-29T13:55:00.CONTENT_CN:
因應假日出行高峰，目前使用羅湖及落馬洲支線管制站人數眾多，東鐵綫車站已加派人手協助乘客。請乘客為行程預留時間，並考慮使用其他口岸過關。
因應口岸人多，東鐵綫來往金鐘至羅湖及落馬洲的列車班次已作出調整，請乘客留意列車班次的終點站。

2024-03-29T19:22:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department anticipates that tomorrow (30th March) will still be the peak outbound travel period during holidays. Based on the conditions at various land-based Boundary Control Points today, it is expected that starting from tomorrow morning, the traffic of roads connecting to the land-based Boundary Control Points, including the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge and the Shenzhen Bay Bridge, will be very busy. Waiting time and Journey time for public transport services connecting to the land-based Boundary Control Points including the Mass Transit Railway East Rail Line, franchised buses and Gold Bus, will increase. On the other hand, it is anticipated that the demand for public transport services to the Airport will remain high and passenger waiting time will also be longer. Therefore, the Transport Department appeals to the outbound travellers intending to use the land-based Boundary Control Points or the Airport tomorrow to plan ahead their journey, reserve sufficient commuting time, and consider avoiding the morning peak period. The Transport Department has instructed public transport operators to strengthen their services to meet passenger demand. The Transport Department also appeals to passengers to be patient while queueing. The Transport Department's Emergency Transport Coordination Centre will continue to monitor the traffic and public transport service at all land-based Boundary Control Points and disseminate the latest traffic news through the Transport Department's mobile application "HKeMobility".
2024-03-29T19:22:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預料明天（3月30日）依然是假日出行高峰期。參考今日各陸路口岸情況，預計由明天早上開始，連接陸路口岸的道路，包括港珠澳大橋及深圳灣大橋的交通會非常繁忙。而連接陸路口岸的公共運輸服務，包括港鐵東鐵線、專營巴士及金巴等候車時間及車程時間亦會較長。此外，預計往機場的公共運輸需求依然較高，乘客候車時間亦會較長。 故此，運輸署呼籲有計劃於明天使用陸路口岸或機場離境的旅客，預早妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間，並考慮避開早上繁忙時段出行。 運輸署已指示公共運輸服務營辦商加強服務應付乘客需求。運輸署亦呼籲乘客在輪候公共運輸工具時保持忍讓。

2024-03-30T16:38:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Ma On Shan Bypass (Wu Kai Sha bound) near Yiu On Estate which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-03-30T16:38:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的馬鞍山繞道(往烏溪沙方向)近耀安邨的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-03-31T14:46:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following road section is busy:
- Canton Road (Star Ferry Pier bound)
Motorists passing through the above road section are advised to drive with utmost care and patience.
2024-03-31T14:46:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下路段的交通繁忙:
-廣東道(往天星碼頭方向)
駕駛人士行經上述路段敬請忍讓及小心駕駛。

description.LOCATION_EN: Hong Kong Zhuhai-Macao-Bridge Hong Kong Link Road
description.LOCATION_CN: 港珠澳大橋香港連接路

2024-03-31T15:35:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR, with details as shown below: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR is lowered from 100 km/h to 50 km/h.
2024-03-31T15:35:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於強風，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路的最高車速限制由每小時100 公里降低至每小時50 公里。

2024-03-31T17:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to improved weather condition, the following arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR resumes to 100 km/h.
2024-03-31T17:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 因天氣情況改善，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路最高車速限制恢復為每小時100 公里。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: The Transport Department appeals to inbound travellers to plan ahead their journeys  reserve sufficient commuting time
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 運輸署呼籲跨境旅客預早妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。

2024-03-31T18:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department anticipates that more travellers would return to Hong Kong via land-based Boundary Control Points or the Airport tomorrow (1st April). The Transport Department appeals to these inbound travellers to plan ahead their journeys and reserve sufficient commuting time. It is anticipated that the demand for public transport services will be higher during the period and the waiting time for public transport services would increase. The Transport Department has instructed public transport operators to strengthen their services to meet passenger demand. The Transport Department's Emergency Transport Coordination Centre will continue to monitor the traffic and public transport service at all land-based Boundary Control Points and the Airport, and shall disseminate the latest traffic news through the Transport Department's mobile application "HKeMobility".
2024-03-31T18:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預料明天（4月1日）將有較多跨境旅客使用陸路口岸或機場回港，運輸署呼籲有關旅客預早妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。 預計在返港高峰時間的公共運輸需求會較高，乘客候車時間亦會較長。運輸署已指示公共運輸服務營辦商加強服務應付乘客需求。 運輸署的緊急交通事故協調中心會繼續監察各陸路口岸及機場的交通及公共運輸服務情況，並透過運輸署流動應用程式「香港出行易」，發放最新的交通消息。
